title: lycopodium pachystachyon var. phyllanthum
intro: Lycopodium pachystachyon var. phyllanthum, also known as Phyllanthus, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Lycopodium pachystachyon var. phyllanthum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its herbal preparations are used to support immune function and overall well-being.
